Our Specials

Café Rue Bourbon - $15

A chilled shot of espresso mixed with High West Bourbon and Kahlua, served over a cold-brew ice cube and finished with vanilla foam

Ma Chérie - $18

Bleu Boheme’s cherry-infused Brandy shaken over ice with port wine and bourbon, served up and topped with rich vanilla cream and a brandied cherry

Rotating Tap- Mike Hess Brewing Fair Point Hazy IPA

Showcases the unique profile of Alora hops, which imparts yuzu lemon and calamansi citrus notes. This beer also features Columbus, Chinook, Nugget, Mosaic, and Citra hops, delivering complex, fruity aromatics with a smooth and subtle sweetness
ABV: 6.8%
(Courtesy of Mike Hess Brewing)
